---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
description-meta: "Curriculum Vitae of Daria Ardelean"
title-block-banner: false
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
---

[Download full PDF version](full_cv.qmd){target="_blank"} 

## Current Position

**PhD in Psychological Sciences** — Department of General Psychology, University of Padova\
Nov 2025 – present · Supervisor: Giorgio Arcara

### Qualifications
**Clinical Psychologist** — Registered in May 2024\


## Education 

**Erasmus+ Traineeship in Non-Invasive Brain Stimulation** — University of Padova, Italy\
Aug 2025 – Nov 2025 · Supervisor: Giulio Contemori

**Erasmus+ Study in Clinical Neuropsychology and Cognitive Neuroscience** — University of Padova\
Feb 2024 – Feb 2025

**MSc, Clinical Psychology and Psychotherapy** — West University of Timișoara\
Sep 2023 – present · 120 ECTS · Final grade: Excellent\
Thesis: *Moderators of cognitive interventions for mild cognitive impairment*

**Erasmus+ Study in Psychological Science** — University of Padova\
Feb 2020 – Jul 2020

**BSc, Psychology** — West University of Timișoara\
Nov 2020 – Jul 2023 · 180 ECTS · Final grade: Excellent\
Thesis: *Empowering future entrepreneurs: Testing a strengths-based mindset intervention in a quasi-experimental pilot study*

## Training

**Foundations of network meta-analysis** — Cochrane\
March 2026 · 24 hours · hybrid course\

## Publications

Ardelean, D. A., Tisu, L., & Vîrgă, D. (2025). Empowering future entrepreneurs: Testing a strengths-based mindset intervention in a quasi-experimental pilot study. *Psihologia Resurselor Umane Journal*, 23(1).

## Conferences and presentations

**National Alzheimer Conference** — Bucharest, Romania\
2025 · E-poster presentation\

**Metacognition, Aging and Perception Symposium** — Rovereto, Italy\
2025 · Poster session\

## Honours and awards

**Fellowship for doctoral studies (3 years)** — Scuola Galileiana di Studi Superiori, 2025

## Languages

Romanian (mother tongue) · English (C1) · French (B1) · Italian (A2-B1)
